summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy continues with over $3.6 billion raised in the past six weeks, headlined by back-to-back $500M rounds for Nexthop AI and MatX. Meanwhile, Ayar Labs (San Jose), Rhoda AI (Palo Alto), and Eridu (Saratoga) each crossed the $200M mark, signaling investor confidence in AI infrastructure despite market churn. On the hiring front, seven local companies are actively expanding while two are trimming sails, suggesting selective optimism across the region.
